prompt:
I'm overwhelmed with school.

###

I feel anxious before exams.

###

I can't stop thinking about my mistakes.

###

I feel lonely at school.

###

I'm stressed about deadlines.

###

I feel sad all the time.

###

I get panic attacks sometimes.

###

I feel like I'm not good enough.

###

I get nervous talking to teachers.

###

I can't focus on studying.

###

Nalulungkot ako kasi lagi akong nabibigo.

###

I'm panicking about the upcoming project deadline.

###

Pagod na pagod na ako sa lahat ng gawaing school.

###

I feel hopeless about my grades.

###

Takot ako na baka hindi ako pumasa sa exams.

###

I'm feeling fine today, just relaxed.

###

Gusto ko lang magpahinga at huwag mag-alala.

###

I feel like giving up sometimes.

###

Panic attacks are scaring me at night.

###

Gusto kong makausap ang counselor tungkol sa nararamdaman ko.

###
